symbols.name: JobSchedulerService
symbols.summary: Provides the in-memory inline job runtime implementation.

syntax.content: public class JobSchedulerService : IJobSchedulerService

symbols.name: JobSchedulerService(TimeProvider, IServiceScopeFactory, JobRegistrationStore, IJobTriggerEvaluator, IJobStoreProvider, ISerializer, JobEventSourceRegistry, JobSchedulerHostedOptions, IEnumerable, IHostEnvironment, ILoggerFactory)
symbols.summary: Provides the in-memory inline job runtime implementation.

syntax.content: public JobSchedulerService(TimeProvider timeProvider, IServiceScopeFactory scopeFactory, JobRegistrationStore registrations, IJobTriggerEvaluator triggerEvaluator, IJobStoreProvider storeProvider, ISerializer serializer, JobEventSourceRegistry eventSources, JobSchedulerHostedOptions options = null, IEnumerable exceptionHandlers = null, IHostEnvironment hostEnvironment = null, ILoggerFactory loggerFactory = null)

symbols.name: DispatchAsync(object, JobDispatchOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Dispatches the specified job type using its configured manual trigger.

syntax.content: public Task> DispatchAsync(object data = null, JobDispatchOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) where TJob : class, IJob

symbols.name: DispatchAsync(string, object, JobDispatchOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Dispatches the specified job name using its configured manual trigger.

syntax.content: public Task> DispatchAsync(string jobName, object data = null, JobDispatchOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: DispatchAndWaitAsync(object, JobDispatchOptions, TimeSpan?, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Dispatches the specified job type and waits until the inline execution reaches a terminal state.

syntax.content: public Task> DispatchAndWaitAsync(object data = null, JobDispatchOptions options = null, TimeSpan? timeout = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) where TJob : class, IJob

symbols.name: DispatchAndWaitAsync(string, object, JobDispatchOptions, TimeSpan?, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Dispatches the specified job name and waits until the inline execution reaches a terminal state.

syntax.content: public Task> DispatchAndWaitAsync(string jobName, object data = null, JobDispatchOptions options = null, TimeSpan? timeout = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
